name: aish Enterprise
description: Connects the open-source aish client to the aish.sh commercial control plane — managed tiered memory, LLM tracing + tuning recs, governance/policy, a managed MCP gateway, and an org skill registry — entirely through aish's existing hooks / skills / MCP / config seams. No fork of the OSS binary.
author: LightHeart Ventures

//provides-notes.mcp_server: Injects a single authenticated aish.sh gateway server into the client MCP set (see .mcp.json). The gateway is the claude.ai-style managed proxy: it holds OAuth/secrets, curates the server list, meters calls, and enforces per-org allow/deny. Powers Pillar D.
//provides-notes.skills: Empty on disk by design — org-private skills are delivered dynamically by pointing the client skill provider at the aish.sh registry (see config.skill_registry). Powers Pillars C & E.
//provides-notes.event_hooks: Contributes entries to the client's REAL 33-event hooks.json catalog (src/hooks.rs) — NOT the draft webhook model. Every entry routes an event payload to the forwarder binary; PreToolUse is a blocking policy veto. See hooks.json. This is the load-bearing enterprise seam (Pillars A, B, F, G).
//provides-notes.login: Device-code auth binding the CLI to a tenant; establishes the credential the forwarder + gateway + registry all reuse. Requires the aish-client `provides.login` capability (tracked in the OSS PLUGIN_SYSTEM_DESIGN addendum).

tenant_id.description: aish.sh tenant this client is bound to (written by `aish login`).

gateway_url.description: Base URL of the managed MCP gateway (Pillar D). Injected into the client .mcp.json.

ingest_url.description: Trace/telemetry + memory-sync ingest endpoint the event forwarder ships payloads to (Pillars A, B).

policy_url.description: Policy-decision endpoint consulted by the PreToolUse blocking hook (Pillars F, G).

skill_registry_url.description: Org skill registry. Exported as AISH_SKILL_REGISTRY so the client skill provider fetches org-private, versioned, signed skills (Pillars C, E).

api_key.description: Tenant credential (env ref: ${env:AISH_ENTERPRISE_API_KEY} or ~/.aish/credentials profile). Never embedded in hook payloads.

policy_enforcement.description: off = no PreToolUse hook; audit = log decisions, never deny; enforce = deny disallowed tools/commands/servers/models.

offline_default.description: Fail-open vs fail-closed when the policy endpoint is unreachable. `deny` sets the PreToolUse hook `required:true`.

memory_sync.description: Enable tiered-memory sync via MemoryStored / PreCompact / PostCompact hooks (Pillar A).

trace_sampling.description: 0.0–1.0 sampling ratio for TurnEnd / PostToolUse trace ingest.
